title: Bushy Biomes
description: Adds bushy leaves and biome variation to your game
body:
# BetterVanillaBuilding, By StefanJ2_
**Download from the [official website](https://bettervanillabuilding.com/):**
- Download all editions
- Download addon versions
- See all pack features

[![BetterVanillaBuilding website](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f0f123a835c8ba719f7d3288074e96a907c2e43.png)](https://bettervanillabuilding.com/)

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e25d7050de673271a8ab33cd0db2cdb69d4a1fa.png)](https://discord.gg/a6KDAEpy6N)[![Twitch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae95f05075ea9788053db9f0ff57bfdf352bcd6b.png)](https://www.twitch.tv/stefanj2_)[![Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8c479244841e2fbcbde64c2e51fe3610f6ef432.png)](https://www.patreon.com/BetterVanillaBuilding)

## What to expect
BushyBiomes adds bushy leaves to the game while also working alongside BetterVanillaBuilding's custom biome colors. BushyBiomes can be used together with BetterVanillaBuilding or as a standalone pack. 

## Get your own Minecraft Server
[![Shockbyte](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9360084db5b7016f32cdf6978d0ca72c50b5d351.png)](https://shockbyte.com/partner/stefanj2_)
